phase_1.label: Inventory
phase_1.summary: 34 files audited, architecture mapped, 14 problems catalogued (2 red, 6 orange, 6 yellow)

phase_2.label: Plan
phase_2.summary: Minimal reorganisation approved: active modules stay at root, legacy/CLI/docs moved to subdirectories, duplicate constants to be wired via import

phase_3.label: Execute
commits: pre-existing unstaged work staged and committed (7 commits)
G1: wire ANATOMICAL_LOCATIONS + SENSATION_TAGS import in views/checkin.py
G2: move init_db.py + schema.sql to legacy/; fix SCHEMA_PATH
G3: move Training_System.md + Stage_1_14_Day_Plan.md to docs/training/
P1: fix ACWR Stage 3 ceiling (engine.py + rules.py + tests.py)

phase_4.label: Document
phase_4.summary: All five Phase 4 documents written from real codebase content.

problems.title: ACWR Stage 3 ceiling hardcoded to 1.3 instead of 1.5
problems.fix: engine.py derives ceiling from rules.STAGE_CONSTRAINTS; test added

problems.title: ANATOMICAL_LOCATIONS duplicated in training_constants.py and views/checkin.py
problems.fix: G1: views/checkin.py now imports from training_constants

problems.title: SENSATION_TAGS duplicated in training_constants.py and views/checkin.py
problems.fix: G1: views/checkin.py now imports from training_constants

problems.title: patient_profile.py not imported by any active module
problems.note: Intentional — human reference only. Stays at root for easy editing. Not wired.

problems.title: ai.py MODEL_FAST / MODEL_SMART constants reference LLM model names
problems.note: Constants are currently unused sentinels. No LLM is called. Leave as-is.

problems.title: sync_sheets.py has no error handling for missing credentials
problems.note: Out of scope for refiling phase. Would require behaviour change — defer.

problems.title: training_plan.py: PLAN dict and training_constants.py: EXERCISES may drift
problems.note: Different concerns (day plan vs. exercise catalogue). No deduplication needed.

problems.title: README.md is empty
problems.note: CLAUDE.md now covers onboarding. README can remain minimal or be filled later.

problems.title: No .gitignore entry for legacy/ SQLite database
problems.note: health_engine.db is not created by default; Notion is the live backend. Deferred.

problems.title: init_db.py and schema.sql at root — orphaned legacy files
problems.fix: G2: moved to legacy/; SCHEMA_PATH made __file__-relative

problems.title: Training plan/ at root — stale duplicate of docs/training/
problems.note: Contents copied to docs/training/ in G3. Manual deletion blocked by sandbox deny rules. User must run: Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'Training plan'

problems.title: Oura_template.jpg and background_templates/ untracked
problems.note: Out of scope for refiling. User should commit or gitignore when ready.

problems.title: docs/resume.md had stale pages/ references
problems.fix: Phase 4: updated to reflect _pages/ stubs + views/ structure

manual_actions_required.reason: Sandbox deny rules block Remove-Item inside Claude — must be run in user terminal
Design assets not yet committed — decide whether they belong in git
